scripts.predev:
node -e "const [maj,min]=process.versions.node.split('.').map(Number);if(maj<20||(maj===20&&min<19)){console.error('
✗ Node '+process.version+' detected. Vite requires Node >=20.19 or >=22.12.
  Run: nvm use 22
');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.dev: node scripts/docker-compose.mjs up -d --build && node scripts/migrate.js && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "api,web,agents" -c "cyan,magenta,green" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix app run dev" "npm --prefix backend run start:agents"
scripts.infra:build: node scripts/docker-compose.mjs build postgres prometheus loki grafana
scripts.infra:reset: docker compose down -v && docker rmi -f experient-postgres:local experient-prometheus:local experient-loki:local experient-grafana:local 2>/dev/null; node scripts/docker-compose.mjs build postgres prometheus loki grafana && node scripts/docker-compose.mjs up -d
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && node scripts/docker-compose.mjs build postgres && node scripts/docker-compose.mjs up -d && node scripts/migrate.js
scripts.setup:dev: cp -n .env.example .env 2>/dev/null && echo '✓ .env created — fill in OPENROUTER_API_KEY and CLERK_SECRET_KEY before starting' || echo '✓ .env already exists'
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix app install
scripts.setup:agents: test -d agents/.venv || python3 -m venv agents/.venv; agents/.venv/bin/pip install -q -r agents/requirements.txt
scripts.scan-models: npm run setup:agents --silent && PYTHONPATH=. agents/.venv/bin/python -m agents.skills.openrouter_scan
